config.title: OSTF_TITLE #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'enum2str #include "50100"
'suggestion #include "50200" 'section #include "50128" 'section #include "50222"
QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_SRTRW_LABEL,pSRTRW) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_MUJO,pMUJO) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_OSOBAODP,pPracownik)
QVX_REJESTR_DOK(CTRLID_REJDOK) QVX_DOWOD_KSIEGOWY(CTRLID_DOWKSIEG) QVX_SCHEMAT_DEKR(CTRLID_SCHEMAT) QVX_WPROWADZIL_MODYFIKOWAL(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ,CTRLID_UZYTKMODYF,pUzytRej,opsrtrw_pUzytModyf) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_LBL_DOKUMENT,wrefDokument)
#ifdef OSTF_NUMERACJA_OPERACJI setglobprofile GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME1, "Numer operacji" QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX1,1,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME1) #endif
QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_PKPIR,opsrtrw_pPKPIR)
function c##CTRLID_INFO_TEXT##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_INFO_TEXT##_ongetdata=true dim strStatus : strStatus = " " if not page_.root.pSRTRW is nothing then strStatus = "Status: " + enum2str(TYPEID_N5SRTRW, page_.root.pSRTRW.getobjdef.getfieldindex("eStatus"), page_.root.pSRTRW.eStatus) end if oCtrl.text = strStatus end function
function c##CTRLID_AMOR_ROK##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = clng(year(page_.root.dDataAmort)) c##CTRLID_AMOR_ROK##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_AMOR_ROK##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) c##CTRLID_AMOR_ROK##_ondataentered = (newValue >= 1999) page_.root.dDataAmort = DateSerial(newValue,Month(page_.root.dDataAmort),1) end function
function c##CTRLID_AMOR_MC##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = clng(month(page_.root.dDataAmort)) c##CTRLID_AMOR_MC##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_AMOR_MC##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) c##CTRLID_AMOR_MC##_ondataentered = (newValue >= 1 and newValue <= 12) page_.root.dDataAmort = DateSerial(Year(page_.root.dDataAmort),newValue,1) end function
private sub rebuild_configuration dim pConfigObject : set pConfigObject = nothing dim pConfigModule : set pConfigModule = nothing #ifdef ENABLE_DB13 rebuild_operation_buttons_n_2 page_.root.pRejestrDok,CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW, CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW2, pConfigObject, pConfigModule , 1 , 7, 6 #else rebuild_operation_buttons page_.root.pRejestrDok,CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW, pConfigObject, pConfigModule #endif end sub
function fsave dim hli:set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='cust_operation_hli' vn1='STD_OPERATION_FSAVE'") std_cust_operation_hli hli,page_.root.pRejestrDok,page_.root,page_ end function
function cust_operation_hli(byref pHLI) std_cust_operation_hli pHLI,page_.root.pRejestrDok,page_.root,page_ end function
function fopen if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if
section_fopen THIS_FILE rebuild_configuration end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
function foptions FORCE_REALOAD_OBJECT(page_.root.pRejestrDok)
if doc_.getmodule(60175).dok_rej_preferences(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idobj,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ) then
FORCE_REALOAD_OBJECT(page_.root.pRejestrDok)
'apply settings rebuild_configuration end if end function
function fsearch() dim pSearchChoice : set pSearchChoice = doc_.getmodule(60115) pSearchChoice.addAdditionalWhere "n5opsrtrw.eRodzaj=" + cstr(page_.root.eRodzaj) +_ " and n5opsrtrw.pRejestrDok= " + cstr(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idobj) fsearch = pSearchChoice.std_search(page_) set pSearchChoice = nothing end function
function wylicz_AmortPod page_.root.curAmortPod = page_.root.n5opsrtrw_wylicz_amort_pod() end function
function wylicz_AmortBil page_.root.curAmortBil = page_.root.n5opsrtrw_wylicz_amort_bil() end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_PODSTAWOWE,Informacje podstawowe,FORM_SPAN)
QXE_LONG_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_INFO_TEXT,0)
QXR_EDIT_REF_OPEN_REQ(Środek trwały,CTRLID_SRTRW_LABEL,-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5SRTRW,pSRTRW,strNazwa,OSTF_CURSOR_SRODEK,RCELL_SPAN) #ifdef OSTF_NUMERACJA_OPERACJI
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX1,15,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,6,strExtra1,RCELL_SPAN)
#endif #ifdef _DEBUG QXR_INT_FIELD(DEBUG:nNumOpST,-1,6,nNumOpST,RCELL_SPAN) #endif QXR_DATE_FIELD(Data operacji,-1,dDataOper,RCELL_SPAN) QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN) #ifdef OSTF_SHOW_DOKUMENT
QXC_LABEL_OPEN_REQ(CTRLID_LBL_DOKUMENT,OSTF_SHOW_DOKUMENT,1)
OSTF_DOKUMENT_TYPEID wrefDokument OSTF_DOKUMENT_FIELD CRSR_DEFAULT
QXE_PICTURE_CHOICE_EX(OSTF_DOKUMENT_PICTURE,wrefDokument,OSTF_DOKUMENT_FIELD,OSTF_CURSOR_REF,vn3=OSTF_DOKUMENT_TYPEID appvar_rejestr_typ=OSTF_DOKUMENT_REJESTR_TYP)
#endif #ifdef OSTF_SHOW_HEADER
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Ujęcie:,1) QXC_LABEL_REQ(Podatkowe,1) QXC_LABEL_REQ(Bilansowe,1)
#endif #ifdef OSTF_SHOW_WARTUMORZ
QXC_LABEL(Wartość,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,14,2,,curWartoscPod,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,14,2,,curWartoscBil,1)
QXC_LABEL(Umorzenie,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,14,2,,curUmorzPod,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,14,2,,curUmorzBil,1)
#endif #ifdef OSTF_SHOW_AMORT
QXC_LABEL(Amortyzacja ,1)
QXE_LABEL(za miesiąc ) QXE_INT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_AMOR_ROK,4) / QXE_INT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_AMOR_MC,2)
#endif #ifdef OSTF_SHOW_STAWKA
QXC_LABEL(Stawka,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,7,2,%,curStawkaPod,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,7,2,%,curStawkaBil,1)
#endif #ifdef OSTF_SHOW_AMORT
QXE_BUTTON(-1,0,Wylicz,varFunction="wylicz_AmortPod")
QXE_BUTTON(-1,0,Wylicz,varFunction="wylicz_AmortBil")
QXC_LABEL(Kwota,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,14,2,,curAmortPod,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,14,2,,curAmortBil,1)
#endif #ifdef OSTF_SHOW_MIEJSCE QXR_EDIT_REF_OPEN(Miejsce użytkowania,CTRLID_MUJO,-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5JEDN_ORG,pMUJO,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN) #endif #ifdef OSTF_SHOW_OSOBA QXR_EDIT_REF_OPEN(Osoba odpowiedzialna,CTRLID_OSOBAODP,-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRACOWNIK,pPracownik,strNazwisko,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN) #endif
QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_UWAGI,CTRLID_UWAGI,strUwagi,Uwagi,FORM_SPAN)
QXS_BEGIN_REQ(SECID_KSIEGOWANIE,Księgowanie,FORM_SPAN)
QXX_WPROWADZIL_MODYFIKOWAL(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ,CTRLID_UZYTKMODYF,pUzytRej,opsrtrw_pUzytModyf,2)
QXX_REJESTR_DOK(CTRLID_REJDOK,-1,RCELL_SPAN) #ifdef APPCONFIG_PKPIR QXX_KPIR_SCHEMAT(CTRLID_PKPIR,CTRLID_SCHEMAT,opsrtrw_pPKPIR,RCELL_SPAN) #else QXX_DOWOD_KSIEGOWY_SCHEMAT(CTRLID_DOWKSIEG,-1,CTRLID_SCHEMAT,-1,1) #endif QXS_END_REQ(FORM_SPAN) #ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QXX_OPERATIONS_12(CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW,CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW2,FORM_SPAN) #else QXX_OPERATIONS(CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW,FORM_SPAN) #endif QXF_END
